{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = D’Niss ritual
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The ritual of the [[D’Niss]] blazes like a supernova.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c39">''The Knight'', chapter 39</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon events]]
